prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock LE5 2.4L Ecotec turbocharged inline-4 (155-171 hp) with a forged internals build featuring Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Manley H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Callies Compstar. Pair with a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe from Vibrant Performance with a 40mm wastegate.

Fuel System: Upgrade to a dual-pump fuel system with two Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pumps, ID1000x injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator. Install a Motec M150 ECU with a custom flex-fuel calibration for E85 compatibility, paired with a Continental ethanol content sensor.

Suspension & Handling: Replace the stock struts with KW Clubsport coilovers (2-way adjustable damping) and add a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) with poly bushings. Install Cusco 2-point strut tower braces (front and rear) and a full poly subframe bushings kit from Energy Suspension. Use StopTech ST-60 two-piece rotors with 6-piston calipers (front) and 4-piston calipers (rear) for braking.
estetica: Aero: Install a Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Malibu-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler. Add a custom front splitter from APR Performance with adjustable dive planes and a carbon fiber diffuser from Seibon.

Exterior: Replace the stock headlights with Morimoto XB LED projectors (35W) and tint the taillights with VHT Nightshade spray. Apply a full vinyl wrap in Avery Dennison Gloss Metallic Gold with a 3M Matte Black roof and mirror caps. Use OEM-style badges from Badgeskins in carbon fiber.

Wheels: Mount a set of Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x9.5 +25 front, 19x10.5 +35 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/35/19 front, 275/30/19 rear). Use Project Kics R40 lug nuts and a custom center cap with the Malibu Turbo logo.
